examples: For some unaccountable reason, the letter never arrived.
For some unaccountable reason, it struck me as extremely funny.
It was strange; it was wonderful; yes, it was unaccountable--so all said that heard it.
The (private) organizations these men and women fund do unaccountable good in the world.
Critics have called free schools, which are state-funded but privately run, socially divisive and unaccountable.
